allow: PowerShell($pandocPath = \(Get-Command pandoc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \(-not $pandocPath\) { $pandocPath = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages\\JohnMacFarlane.Pandoc_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\\pandoc.exe" }; & $pandocPath "C:\\wamp64\\www\\reporte_danos\\ERS-SIRGDI-v2.1.md" -o "C:\\wamp64\\www\\reporte_danos\\ERS-SIRGDI-v2.1.docx" --from markdown --to docx; Write-Host "Resultado: $LASTEXITCODE")
